title: Light Block Craft
description: Simple datapack to create a light block!
body:
# EN
A simple datapack for crafting light block!

<details>
<summary>Craft Recipe</summary>

![Light Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cd9effcd2b209fe02600a39cda5bf391af87088.png)
</details>

Warning! When crafting, 16 items are created!

# RU
Простой датапак для создания блоков света!

<details>
<summary>Рецепт крафта</summary>

![Light Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cd9effcd2b209fe02600a39cda5bf391af87088.png)
</details>

Внимание! При крафте создаётся 16 предметов!
